scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev -w api" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:3001/api/v1/health -t 120000 -i 500 && npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tradesystem/shared && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w api && npm run test -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w api --if-present && npm run lint -w web --if-present
